title: Stone Drops OP Items
description: Breaking Stone or Deepslate Drops Op Items.
body:
## Stone drops OP items  

Every time you mine stone, it drops insanely OP items instead of the boring normal drops.
From enchanted gear to rare loot, this pack instantly spices up your survival or challenge world.

### ⭐ Features

Stone drops random OP items  
Works in survival, multiplayer, and hardcore 
Lightweight & zero lag 
Great for challenge videos or chaos gameplay

### 📦 Compatibility
### 
Minecraft 1.21+

Datapack — No mods needed

Plug-and-play: just drop into world/datapacks and /reload

### 🎯 Perfect For

Speedruns 
YouTube challenge videos 
Fun SMP chaos
